sentences.target: Ich hole Brot und Milch vom Laden.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə bʁoːt ʊnt mɪlç fɔm ˈlaːdn̩/

translations.de: Ich hole Brot und Milch vom Laden.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə bʁoːt ʊnt mɪlç fɔm ˈlaːdn̩/
translations.en: I’m getting bread and milk from the store.
translations.es: Voy a comprar pan y leche en la tienda.
translations.fr: Je vais acheter du pain et du lait au magasin.
translations.it: Vado a comprare pane e latte al negozio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我去商店买面包和牛奶。
translations.yue: 我去鋪頭買麵包同牛奶。
translations.ru: Я иду в магазин за хлебом и молоком.
translations.pt: Vou comprar pão e leite na loja.
translations.vi: Tôi đi mua bánh mì và sữa ở cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Ik ga brood en melk halen in de winkel.
translations.uk: Я йду до магазину по хліб і молоко.
translations.hu: Elmegyek a boltba kenyérért és tejért.
translations.hi: मैं दुकान से ब्रेड और दूध लेने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Idę do sklepu po chleb i mleko.
translations.el: Πάω στο μαγαζί για ψωμί και γάλα.
translations.nb: Jeg skal kjøpe brød og melk i butikken.
translations.id: Saya akan membeli roti dan susu di toko.
translations.sv: Jag ska köpa bröd och mjölk i affären.
translations.ro: Merg la magazin să cumpăr pâine și lapte.
translations.cs: Jdu do obchodu pro chleba a mléko.
translations.da: Jeg skal købe brød og mælk i butikken.
translations.fi: Menen kauppaan ostamaan leipää ja maitoa.
translations.ja: お店でパンと牛乳を買います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; functions as the subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive and selects an accusative object.
Neuter noun, singular; direct object (accusative), first conjunct in a coordinated NP.
Coordinating conjunction linking two nouns ('Brot' and 'Milch') into a single coordinated object.
Feminine noun, singular; direct object (accusative), second conjunct in the coordination.
Contracted preposition ('von dem'); governs dative and marks source/origin for the following NP.
Masculine noun, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'vom', denoting the source location.

sentences.target: Wir haben Brot und Käse dabei.

translations.de: Wir haben Brot und Käse dabei.
translations.en: We have bread and cheese with us.
translations.es: Tenemos pan y queso con nosotros.
translations.fr: Nous avons du pain et du fromage avec nous.
translations.it: Abbiamo pane e formaggio con noi.
translations.ru: У нас с собой хлеб и сыр.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mang theo bánh mì và phô mai.
translations.nl: We hebben brood en kaas bij ons.
translations.uk: У нас із собою хліб і сир.
translations.hi: हमारे पास ब्रेड और चीज़ है.
translations.pl: Mamy przy sobie chleb i ser.
translations.el: Έχουμε ψωμί και τυρί μαζί μας.
translations.nb: Vi har brød og ost med oss.
translations.sv: Vi har bröd och ost med oss.
translations.ro: Avem pâine și brânză la noi.
translations.cs: Máme s sebou chleba a sýr.
translations.da: Vi har brød og ost med os.
translations.fi: Meillä on leipää ja juustoa mukana.
translations.ja: 私たちはパンとチーズを持っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses possession and selects an accusative object.
Neuter noun, singular; direct object (accusative), first conjunct in a coordinated NP.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'Brot' and 'Käse' as a coordinated object.
Masculine noun, singular; direct object (accusative), second conjunct in the coordination.
Pronominal adverb functioning as a clause-level adjunct; in the idiom 'etwas dabei haben' indicates having something with one/at hand.

sentences.target: Das Zimmer ist klein und hell.

translations.de: Das Zimmer ist klein und hell.
translations.en: The room is small and bright.
translations.es: La habitación es pequeña y luminosa.
translations.fr: La chambre est petite et lumineuse.
translations.it: La stanza è piccola e luminosa.
translations.pt: O quarto é pequeno e claro.
translations.nl: De kamer is klein en licht.
translations.el: Το δωμάτιο είναι μικρό και φωτεινό.
translations.ja: 部屋は小さくて明るいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter nominative singular; determiner modifying 'Zimmer'.
Neuter noun, singular, nominative; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copular verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to predicate adjectives.
Adjective, positive degree; predicate complement of 'ist', first conjunct in a coordinated predicate.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate adjectives ('klein' and 'hell').
Adjective, positive degree; predicate complement of 'ist', second conjunct in the coordination.

sentences.target: Du bringst Salz und Pfeffer mit.

translations.de: Du bringst Salz und Pfeffer mit.
translations.fr: Tu apportes du sel et du poivre.
translations.it: Porti il sale e il pepe.
translations.nl: Jij neemt zout en peper mee.
translations.hu: Te hozod a sót és a borsot.
translations.hi: तुम नमक और काली मिर्च ला रहे हो.
translations.nb: Du tar med salt og pepper.
translations.sv: Du tar med salt och peppar.
translations.da: Du tager salt og peber med.
translations.ja: 塩とこしょうを持ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive. Part of the separable verb 'mitbringen'; the particle appears clause-final.
Neuter noun, singular; direct object (accusative), first conjunct in a coordinated NP.
Coordinating conjunction linking 'Salz' and 'Pfeffer' into a single coordinated object.
Masculine noun, singular; direct object (accusative), second conjunct in the coordination.
Separable verb particle associated with 'bringen' to form 'mitbringen'; placed at clause-final position, contributes the meaning 'bring along/with'.

jp: Ich hole Brot und Milch vom Laden.
Wir haben Brot und Käse dabei.
Das Zimmer ist klein und hell.
Du bringst Salz und Pfeffer mit.

en: I’m getting bread and milk from the store.
We have bread and cheese with us.
The room is small and bright.
